g.text: Normal Account Insert By Sport - Database Flow
Gets last scanned RowVersion from CustomerClassification_Parameter
Gets next scanned RowVersion from CustomerClassification_BySport
Selects TOP 10000 records where RowVersion > LastScannedRow
Returns: CustId, SportGroup, CategoryId, TurnoverRM, WinlossRM, BetCount, ActiveDays, PerformanceTime
Filter: RowVersion > LastScannedRow AND RowVersion <= NextScannedRow
Parse JSON and insert into Temp_NewClassification
Join with CTSCustomer to get CTSCustID
Join with SpecialCustomerClass_BySport to get SpecialCC
Mark IsExistPA if customer has PA classification
Fields: CustID, SportID, CategoryID, ParentID, etc.
Push classification data to Main DB
Push Special CC data to Main DB
